center.name: Robert Cecil Beavan
center.summary: Robert Cecil Beavan是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Andaman coucal，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Andaman coucal or brown coucal (Centropus andamanensis) is a species of non-parasitic cuckoo found in the Andamans, Coco and Table Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Andaman coucal or brown coucal (Centropus andamanensis) is a species of non-parasitic cuckoo found in the Andamans, Coco and Table Islands
